description: Upstream fork registry — maps each forked repo to its original source, local paths, and sync strategy.

upstreams.description: 1246+ agentic skills for Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Cursor
upstreams.notes: Already has adapt-skills.yml CI workflow. Main skill feeder.

upstreams.description: Agentic skills framework & dev methodology (brainstorming, TDD, plans, git worktrees)
upstreams.notes: Core dev methodology. Skills are individual markdown files in skills/ dir.

upstreams.description: AI design intelligence — 50 styles, 97 palettes, 57 font pairings, design system generator
upstreams.notes: Single skill with scripts/ and data/ dirs. Keep AGI integration block.
Google Labs skills. May have new skills we haven't imported yet.

upstreams.description: Yuan3.0 MoE model — 40B params, RAPO reinforcement learning
upstreams.notes: Research reference for MoE/RAPO patterns. No direct skill mapping yet.
Fork has diverged from upstream (Aperant). Sync fork first, then check if our changes can be preserved and merged with new upstream features.

upstreams.description: Full-stack multi-agent system framework with memory, knowledge, reasoning
upstreams.notes: Reference for multi-agent patterns. Could inform agent teams architecture.

upstreams.description: Open-source platform to build and deploy AI agent workflows
upstreams.notes: Agent workflow platform reference. Could inspire playbook engine improvements.

upstreams.description: System prompts collection for major AI platforms
upstreams.notes: Prompt engineering reference. Useful for platform-adaptive prompt patterns.

sync_strategies.skill-adapt: Clone upstream, run adapt script to merge into extended skills with AGI integration blocks
sync_strategies.skill-diff: Clone upstream, diff individual skills against local copies, update changed ones preserving AGI blocks
sync_strategies.full-replace: Clone upstream, replace local content but preserve AGI integration markers
sync_strategies.inspect-merge: Clone both fork and upstream, compare divergence, produce merge report for manual review
sync_strategies.reference-only: Clone for inspection, produce summary of new features/patterns. No auto-merge.
